nasb.text: Now their settlement extended from Mesha as you go toward Sephar, the hill country of the east.

esv.text: The territory in which they lived extended from Mesha in the direction of Sephar to the hill country of the east.

cnv.text: 他們居住的地方，是從米沙伸向西發，直到東邊的山地。

ccb.text: 他们居住的地方，从米沙直到东边的西发山区。

csbs.text: 他们居住的地方从米沙延伸到东方的山地悉法。
